scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/customers.js && node --check src/routes/dashboard.js && node --check src/routes/quotes.js && node --check src/routes/invoices.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check src/middleware/requestContext.js && node --check src/middleware/requestLogger.js && node --check src/middleware/authRateLimit.js && node --check src/middleware/metrics.js && node --check src/utils/jwt.js && node --check src/utils/pdf.js && node --check src/utils/documents.js && node --check src/utils/response.js && node --check src/utils/httpErrors.js && node --check src/utils/audit.js && node --check scripts/seed.js && node --check scripts/purgeDemoData.js && node --check scripts/backupDb.js && node --check scripts/restoreDb.js && node --check scripts/perfBenchmark.js && node --check scripts/drillBackupRestore.js && node --check scripts/smokeApi.js
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --runInBand
scripts.test:watch: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --watch --runInBand
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules NODE_ENV=test DB_PATH=./test.sqlite JWT_SECRET=test_secret jest --coverage --runInBand
scripts.quality:gate: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:coverage
